records.question: Which stations have at most 13 platforms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.number_of_platforms <= 13
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where number_of_platforms <= 13 limit 5
records.thought: I will select stations where the number of platforms is at most 13 and limit the result to 5.

records.question: Which station named London Waterloo has exactly 19 platforms, exactly 9.489 annual interchanges, and main services on the South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.number_of_platforms = 19 AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where lower(name) = 'london waterloo' and number_of_platforms = 19 and annual_interchanges = 9.489 and lower(main_services) like '%south western main line west of england main line%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter stations by exact name 'London Waterloo', number of platforms 19, annual interchanges 9.489, and main services containing 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line'.

records.question: Which stations in London on the Brighton Main Line have at most 26.892 total passengers and are served daily at 04:20 by the Parasuram Express?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.location = 'London' AND station.main_services = 'Brighton Main Line' AND station.total_passengers <= 26.892 AND train.name = 'Parasuram Express' AND train.time = '04:20' AND train.service = 'Daily'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station join train_station on station.station_id = train_station.station_id join train on train_station.train_id = train.train_id where lower(station.location) like '%london%' and lower(station.main_services) like '%brighton main line%' and station.total_passengers <= 26.892 and lower(train.name) like '%parasuram express%' and train.time = '04:20' limit 5
records.thought: Filter stations located in London on the Brighton Main Line with total passengers at most 26.892, joined with trains named Parasuram Express running daily at 04:20.

records.question: Which stations have an annual entry and exit of at most 26.639?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.annual_entry_exit <= 26.639
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where station.annual_entry_exit <= 26.639 limit 5
records.thought: Filter stations where the annual entry and exit is less than or equal to 26.639 and select their station_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which stations have at least 103.534 total passengers and are served by the Ananthapuri Express where the time is 17:15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
JOIN train ON train_station.train_id = train.train_id
WHERE station.total_passengers >= 103.534 AND train.time = '17:15' AND train.name = 'Ananthapuri Express'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station join train_station on station.station_id = train_station.station_id join train on train_station.train_id = train.train_id where station.total_passengers >= 103.534 and lower(train.name) like '%ananthapuri express%' and train.time = '17:15' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter stations with total passengers >= 103.534 and joined with trains named like 'ananthapuri express' running at time '17:15'.

records.question: Which stations have total passengers of at most 29.658?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.total_passengers <= 29.658
records.pred_sql: select station_id from station where total_passengers <= 29.658 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find stations where the total passengers are at most 29.658, so we filter the station table by Total_Passengers <= 29.658 and select the station_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which stations named London Charing Cross in London serve the South Eastern Main Line, have at least 6 platforms, annual interchanges of 1.99 or more, annual entry and exit of 38.005 or more, and total passengers exactly 39.995?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
WHERE station.main_services = 'South Eastern Main Line' AND station.annual_interchanges >= 1.99 AND station.annual_entry_exit >= 38.005 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 6 AND station.location = 'London' AND station.name = 'London Charing Cross' AND station.total_passengers = 39.995
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where lower(name) like '%london charing cross%' and lower(location) like '%london%' and lower(main_services) like '%south eastern main line%' and number_of_platforms >= 6 and annual_interchanges >= 1.99 and annual_entry_exit >= 38.005 and total_passengers = 39.995 limit 5
records.thought: Filter stations by name, location, main services, number of platforms, annual interchanges, annual entry and exit, and total passengers as specified.

records.question: Which stations named London King's Cross in London have East Coast Main Line as their main service, exactly 30.896 total passengers, and at most 3.022 annual interchanges?

records.thought: Filter stations by name, location, main service, total passengers, and annual interchanges with exact and range conditions.

records.question: Which stations named London Waterloo located in London have at most 103.534 total passengers, at least 94.046 annual entry and exit, exactly 9.489 annual interchanges, at least 19 platforms, and whose main services are South Western Main Line West of England Main Line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.station_id FROM station
JOIN train_station ON station.station_id = train_station.station_id
WHERE station.total_passengers <= 103.534 AND station.annual_entry_exit >= 94.046 AND station.annual_interchanges = 9.489 AND station.number_of_platforms >= 19 AND station.name = 'London Waterloo' AND station.main_services = 'South Western Main Line West of England Main Line' AND station.location = 'London'
records.pred_sql: select station.station_id from station where lower(name) = 'london waterloo' and lower(location) = 'london' and total_passengers <= 103.534 and annual_entry_exit >= 94.046 and annual_interchanges = 9.489 and number_of_platforms >= 19 and lower(main_services) like '%south western main line%' and lower(main_services) like '%west of england main line%' limit 5
records.thought: Filter stations by exact name 'London Waterloo', location 'London', total passengers <= 103.534, annual entry and exit >= 94.046, annual interchanges = 9.489, number of platforms >= 19, and main services containing both 'South Western Main Line' and 'West of England Main Line'.
